model_selection_rule: Highest specificity among six Original/SMOTE candidates at development OOF sensitivity >= 85%; tie-break by ROC-AUC then PR-AUC
threshold_derivation: Highest specificity among development OOF thresholds with sensitivity >= pre-specified target
target_rationale: Project-defined screening operating target prioritizing false-negative reduction; not a universal WHO or USPSTF requirement.
training_scope: development split only; independent holdout excluded
display_note: 위험점수는 보정된 실제 고혈압 발생확률이 아닌 스크리닝용 모델 점수입니다.
